app.name: Comet
app.one_liner: Local-first note-taking app with end-to-end encrypted sync via Nostr and encrypted blob storage via Blossom.

screens.name: Note Editor
screens.purpose: Primary interface for creating, editing, and managing encrypted notes with local-first persistence.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist a note to the per-account SQLite database with encryption metadata.

rust_commands.name: seed_account
rust_commands.purpose: Initialize a deterministic account using a fixed NSEC from .env for testing or onboarding.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement local SQLite storage with per-account databases
week 1: Integrate Just-based dev and seed workflows
week 1: Set up Turborepo monorepo with app, relay, and Blossom workspaces
acceptance_tests: Gutter clicks in editor are clamped to valid boundaries to prevent UI errors.
Newly created note editor receives immediate focus after creation.
User can run `just app-seed` to create a seeded account with fixture notes.
